channel.title: GitHub Nextflow Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Nextflow in GitHub

item.title: nf-core/modules
item.description: Repository to host tool-specific module files for the Nextflow DSL2 community!

item.title: nf-core/rnaseq
item.description: RNA sequencing analysis pipeline using STAR, RSEM, HISAT2 or Salmon with gene/isoform counts and extensive quality control.

item.title: nf-core/raredisease
item.description: Call and score variants from WGS/WES of rare disease patients.

item.title: nf-core/methylseq
item.description: Methylation (Bisulfite-Sequencing) analysis pipeline using Bismark or bwa-meth + MethylDackel

item.title: nf-core/scdownstream
item.description: A single cell transcriptomics pipeline for QC, integration and making the data presentable

item.title: nf-core/differentialabundance
item.description: Differential abundance analysis for feature/ observation matrices from platforms such as RNA-seq
